name: OR Tambo International Airport
description: South Africa's busiest airport and primary international gateway, serving over 20 million passengers annually.
tourist_notes: Most international flights to South Africa land here. Car hire desks are located in the international arrivals hall.

name: Cape Town International Airport
description: Gateway to the Western Cape, one of the world's top tourist destinations.
tourist_notes: Car hire desks are in the arrivals hall. The Garden Route and Winelands are easily accessible by car.

name: King Shaka International Airport
description: KwaZulu-Natal's main airport, serving Durban and the surrounding regions.
tourist_notes: Gateway to the Drakensberg mountains and Zulu Kingdom heritage sites.

name: George Airport
description: The main access point for the famous Garden Route.
tourist_notes: Flying into George is the most convenient way to start or end a Garden Route road trip.

name: Kruger Mpumalanga International Airport
description: The closest airport to the Kruger National Park.
tourist_notes: Most visitors on safari fly into KMIA. 4x4 and SUV vehicles are recommended for game drives.
